{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Kern's helmet
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kern's helmet]] is carved into the aspect of a snarling bull.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]]'s bull helmet was cracked into two pieces.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
